incident: Elasticsearch node es-node-02 OOM-killed: JVM GC pauses escalate -> heap exhausted -> node unreachable -> shards unassigned -> index writes fail and documents are dropped, amid recurring S3 signature distractor

ground_truth.desc: JVM GC pause on es-node-02 growing to 15s before OOM
TCP connection reset after node died
Index write failures due to missing shards
Write queue saturated at max depth

ground_truth.needle: dropped documents due to full queue
ground_truth.desc: Documents permanently lost due to overflow
